_note: Prefer `elements` ΓÇö `tree_markdown` will continue to work but new fields will only be added to the structured side. Issue #22865: use `max_elements` / `max_depth` to bound the UIA walk on apps with very large trees.

elements.label: 1 settings are ready for this Steam installation.
Fast quiet CEF flags + High priority Steam start (Steam launches before the contention guard).
Background CEF pages get low memory priority plus EcoQoS while gaming; the foreground Steam window stays Normal. Allocated memory is not mislabeled as reclaimed.
Caches, leftovers, crashpads cleaned; games preserved.
Quieter overlay and lighter library web views.
Steam CEF uses the GPU instead of costly software rendering.
No autostart; toasts off; tray not promoted.
Shortcuts use Exo launcher; no desktop icons.
Full apply recorded with durable quiet + runtime intact.

tree_markdown:
- Window "Exo"
  - Pane "Non Client Input Sink Window"
  - Pane "AppWindow Custom Title Bar"
    - [0] Button "Minimize" [id=Minimize actions=[invoke]]
    - [1] Button "Maximize" [id=Maximize actions=[invoke]]
    - [2] Button "Close" [id=Close actions=[invoke]]
